---
title: "MD01 Loading"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
r_libs_user <- Sys.getenv("R_LIBS_USER")
if (r_libs_user == "") stop("R_LIBS_USER is not set.")
.libPaths(c(r_libs_user, .libPaths()))

library(fs)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

pro_dir <- Sys.getenv("PRODIR")
if (pro_dir == "") stop("PRODIR is not set.")

garmin_file <- file.path(pro_dir, "garmin_all_raw.rds")
if (!file.exists(garmin_file)) stop("Missing file: ", garmin_file)

garmin_all <- readRDS(garmin_file)
if (nrow(garmin_all) == 0) stop("garmin_all is empty.")
```

```{r overview}
## Overview
overview <- tibble(
  metric = c("Rows", "Columns", "Participants", "Data types"),
  value = c(
    nrow(garmin_all),
    ncol(garmin_all),
    n_distinct(garmin_all$participant_id),
    n_distinct(garmin_all$data_type)
  )
)

knitr::kable(overview)
```

```{r participant rows}
## Participant rows
participant_counts <- garmin_all %>%
  count(participant_id, name = "n_rows") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_rows))

ggplot(participant_counts, aes(x = reorder(participant_id, n_rows), y = n_rows)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Rows per participant",
    x = "Participant ID",
    y = "Rows"
  )
```

```{r per data}
## Participant per data type
datatype_counts <- garmin_all %>%
  distinct(participant_id, data_type) %>%
  count(data_type, name = "n_participants") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_participants))

ggplot(datatype_counts, aes(x = reorder(data_type, n_participants), y = n_participants)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Participants per data type",
    x = "Data type",
    y = "Participants"
  )
```
